offer_structure.exceptional_offer_criteria: Reserved for exceptional circumstances (e.g., Andrew McIntee: mortgage-free, hard Sept 1 relocation deadline, high-value property)

offer_appropriate_when: At least one GL signal present (GL-SELF, GL-MGMT, GL-TIME)
No unresolved DLY-OTH gates (spouse not in room = no offer yet)
Property meets minimum viability (>£12k STL net)
offer_inappropriate_when: Spouse/partner gate active (close without gate present = abandoned)
Guaranteed rent demand (offer is irrelevant — product mismatch)
Lead clearly not ready — renovation >3 months away

deadline_setting.principle: Deadline must be BEFORE the lead’s primary gating event
deadline_setting.good_deadline: Tenant leaving 30 April → Offer deadline 22 April
deadline_setting.bad_deadline: Tenant leaving 30 April → Offer deadline 30 April (tenant renewal kills it)
deadline_setting.extension_policy: One extension possible if lead shows genuine engagement. Second extension rarely appropriate.

historical_offer_outcomes.reason: Developer affiliate won with inflated figures

highest_conversion: EX-STL with severe underperformance (<3 reviews in 6 months)
Frictionless profile: no mortgage, furnished, no gates
lowest_conversion: Competitor comparison where Stayful hasn’t explicitly countered inflated projections
